changeSet.author: danikanov
danikanov
changeSet.sql: alter table results.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status; alter table results.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ( 'RUNNING', 'FINISHED', 'UPLOADING', 'STOPPING', 'STOPPED', 'STOPPED_BY_SERVICE_MODE', 'STOPPED_BY_MAX_CHECK_UNITS', 'STOPPED_BY_DAY_GONE'));

rollback.sql: alter table results.arrangements drop constraint if exists ck_status; alter table results.arrangements add constraint ck_status check ( status in ( 'RUNNING', 'FINISHED', 'UPLOADING', 'STOPPING', 'STOPPED', 'STOPPED_BY_SERVICE_MODE', 'STOPPED_BY_MAX_CHECK_UNITS'));
